propose.en: She proposed a new plan to the class.
propose.zh: 她向全班提出一個新計畫。

protect.en: Wear a helmet to protect your head.

protective.en: A mother bird is protective of her eggs.

prove.en: He worked hard to prove he could do it.

pudding.en: We had chocolate pudding for dessert.
pudding.zh: 我們甜點吃了巧克力布丁。

pumpkin.en: We carved a face on the pumpkin.
pumpkin.zh: 我們在南瓜上刻了一張臉。

punish.en: The teacher punished the student for cheating.
punish.zh: 老師處罰了作弊的學生。

pupil.en: Every pupil in the class passed the exam.
pupil.zh: 班上每個學生都通過了考試。

puppy.en: The puppy wagged its tail happily.

purpose.en: What is the purpose of this meeting?
purpose.zh: 這次會議的目的是什麼？

puzzle.zh: 他解開了那個困難的謎題。

quality.en: This shop sells high quality clothes.
quality.zh: 這家店賣高品質的衣服。

quantity.en: We need a large quantity of paper.

quiz.en: We had a short English quiz today.
quiz.zh: 我們今天有個簡短的英文小考。

railroad-railway.en: The railroad connects the two cities.
railroad-railway.zh: 這條鐵路連接兩座城市。

raincoat.en: Wear a raincoat; it's pouring outside.
raincoat.zh: 穿上雨衣，外面在下大雨。

range.en: The shop sells a wide range of toys.
range.zh: 這家店賣各式各樣的玩具。

rapid.en: There was a rapid change in the weather.
rapid.zh: 天氣出現了快速的變化。

rat.en: A rat ran across the kitchen.

rather.en: I would rather stay home tonight.

realize.en: I didn't realize how late it was.
realize.zh: 我沒意識到已經這麼晚了。

receive.en: I received a gift from my friend.

recent.en: In recent years, prices have risen.

record.en: She broke the school running record.
record.zh: 她打破了學校的跑步紀錄。

recover.en: He is recovering from his illness.

refrigerator-fridge.en: Put the milk in the refrigerator.

regard.en: I regard him as a good friend.

region.en: This region is famous for its tea.

regular.en: He is a regular customer at the cafe.
regular.zh: 他是這家咖啡館的常客。

relate.en: This story relates to my own life.
relate.zh: 這個故事和我自己的生活有關。

relation.en: There is a close relation between the two.
relation.zh: 這兩者之間有密切的關係。

religion.en: People of every religion are welcome.
religion.zh: 歡迎各種宗教信仰的人。

remove.en: Please remove your shoes at the door.

rent.en: They rent a small apartment downtown.
rent.zh: 他們在市區租了一間小公寓。

reply.en: Please reply to my email soon.
reply.zh: 請盡快回覆我的電子郵件。

require.en: This job requires a lot of patience.
require.zh: 這份工作需要很多耐心。

respond.en: She responded to my question quickly.
respond.zh: 她很快回應了我的問題。

responsible.en: He is responsible for cleaning the room.

restroom.en: The restroom is on the second floor.

result.en: We are happy with the test results.
result.zh: 我們對考試結果很滿意。

return.en: Please return the book to the library.

review.en: We review the lesson before the test.

riches.en: Health is more valuable than riches.

rocky.en: The path up the hill was rocky.

role.en: She played the role of the queen.

rooster.en: The rooster crows early in the morning.

rub.en: She rubbed her eyes when she woke up.

rubber.en: The boots are made of rubber.

rude.en: It is rude to interrupt people.
rude.zh: 打斷別人說話是不禮貌的。

safety.en: Wear a seatbelt for your safety.

sail.en: The boat sailed across the lake.

sailor.en: The sailor worked hard on the ship.

salesperson-salesman-saleswoman.en: The salesperson showed us many shoes.
salesperson-salesman-saleswoman.zh: 店員給我們看了許多鞋子。

salty.en: The soup is too salty for me.

sample.en: She gave me a free sample of cheese.
sample.zh: 她給了我一份免費的起司試吃。

sand.en: The children played in the sand.

sandwich.en: I made a ham sandwich for lunch.
sandwich.zh: 我午餐做了一個火腿三明治。

satisfy.en: The meal did not satisfy his hunger.
satisfy.zh: 那頓飯沒有滿足他的飢餓。

saw.en: He cut the wood with a saw.

scare.en: The loud noise scared the baby.
scare.zh: 巨大的聲響嚇到了寶寶。

scared.en: She was scared of the dark.

scene.en: The first scene of the play was funny.
scene.zh: 這齣戲的第一幕很好笑。

schedule.en: My schedule is full this week.

scooter.en: She rides a scooter to school.

score.en: He got a high score on the test.

screen.en: The movie screen is very big.

seafood.en: We ordered fresh seafood at the restaurant.
seafood.zh: 我們在餐廳點了新鮮的海鮮。

search.en: They searched everywhere for the lost dog.
search.zh: 他們到處尋找走失的狗。

secondary.en: She teaches at a secondary school.

section.en: This section of the book is about animals.
section.zh: 這本書的這部分是關於動物的。

seek.en: They seek help from the teacher.

seesaw.en: The children played on the seesaw.

selection.en: The store has a good selection of toys.
selection.zh: 這家店有很多玩具可選。

selfish.en: Don't be selfish; share with others.

sense.en: Dogs have a strong sense of smell.

sensitive.en: Her skin is very sensitive to the sun.
sensitive.zh: 她的皮膚對陽光很敏感。

separate.en: Please separate the trash from the paper.

servant.en: The servant brought tea to the guests.

serve.en: The restaurant serves breakfast all day.
serve.zh: 這家餐廳全天供應早餐。

settle.en: They settled in a small town by the sea.
settle.zh: 他們在海邊的小鎮定居下來。

sex.en: The form asks for your name and sex.
sex.zh: 這張表格詢問你的姓名和性別。

shame.en: What a shame that you missed the show.

shark.en: A shark has very sharp teeth.
shark.zh: 鯊魚有非常鋒利的牙齒。

sheet.en: She wrote her answers on a sheet of paper.
sheet.zh: 她把答案寫在一張紙上。

shelf.en: The books are on the top shelf.

shell.en: I found a pretty shell on the beach.
shell.zh: 我在海灘上找到一個漂亮的貝殼。

shock.en: The bad news was a great shock.

shoot.en: He learned to shoot a basketball.

shopkeeper.zh: 店主向每位顧客打招呼。

shore.en: We walked along the shore at sunset.
shore.zh: 日落時我們沿著岸邊散步。

shot.en: The player scored with a long shot.
shot.zh: 那名球員用一記遠射得分。

shy.en: The shy boy hid behind his mother.
shy.zh: 害羞的男孩躲在媽媽身後。

sidewalk.en: Walk on the sidewalk, not the road.

silence.en: There was complete silence in the room.

silent.en: Everyone was silent during the test.
silent.zh: 考試時大家都安靜無聲。

similar.zh: 他們的聲音聽起來很像。

simply.en: I simply forgot to call you.

single.en: Not a single cloud was in the sky.

slide.en: The children went down the slide.

slip.en: Be careful not to slip on the wet floor.
slip.zh: 小心別在濕地板上滑倒。

slipper.en: She wears soft slippers at home.

smooth.en: The road was wide and smooth.

snack.en: I had a snack between meals.
snack.zh: 我在兩餐之間吃了點心。

snowy.en: It was a cold and snowy day.
snowy.zh: 那是個又冷又下雪的日子。

society.en: Rules help our society run smoothly.
society.zh: 規則幫助社會順利運作。

sock.en: I can't find my other sock.

soda.en: Too much soda is bad for your teeth.
soda.zh: 喝太多汽水對牙齒不好。

soft.en: The kitten's fur is very soft.

soil.en: Plants grow well in rich soil.
soil.zh: 植物在肥沃的土壤裡長得好。

solution.en: We found a solution to the problem.
solution.zh: 我們找到了問題的解決方法。

solve.en: Can you solve this math problem?
solve.zh: 你能解開這道數學題嗎？

sort.en: Please sort the books by size.

source.en: The sun is a source of energy.

southern.en: It is warmer in the southern part.

speaker.en: The speaker shared a great story.
speaker.zh: 講者分享了一個很棒的故事。

speech.en: She gave a speech in front of the class.

speed.en: Please reduce your speed near the school.

spelling.en: Check the spelling of each word.

spider.en: A spider spun a web in the corner.

spirit.en: She has a strong fighting spirit.

spoon.en: Eat the soup with a spoon.

sport.zh: 籃球是我最喜歡的運動。

spot.en: This is a great spot for a picnic.

stage.en: The singer walked onto the stage.

stamp.en: She put a stamp on the envelope.

standard.zh: 這家飯店有很高的標準。

state.zh: 他清楚地陳述了他的意見。

steak.en: He ordered a steak for dinner.

steel.en: The bridge is made of steel.

step.en: Watch your step on the stairs.

stick.en: The dog brought back the stick.
stick.zh: 那隻狗把樹枝叼了回來。

stomachache.en: I have a stomachache after eating too much.

stone.en: He threw a stone into the river.
stone.zh: 他把一顆石頭丟進河裡。

storm.en: The storm knocked down many trees.

strawberry.en: She picked fresh strawberries from the farm.
strawberry.zh: 她從農場摘了新鮮的草莓。
